title: Fix admin panel button visibility in header after login

requirements.text: Debug and fix the Layout component in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx to ensure the Admin navigation button renders in the header when a user authenticates with Internet Identity, identifying any conditional logic, loading state handling, or hook dependencies that prevent the button from appearing

quotes: It don't show the admin panel button when I login

acceptanceCriteria: Admin button appears in the header immediately after successful Internet Identity login
Button visibility is not blocked by loading states or undefined hook returns
Console logging traces the button rendering decision for debugging

requirements.text: Verify the useIsOwner hook in frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts correctly handles authentication state changes and returns the admin status without blocking or causing rendering delays when the user logs in with Internet Identity

quotes: It don't show the admin panel button when I login

acceptanceCriteria: Hook returns admin status immediately after authentication completes
No race conditions between authentication state and admin check
Loading states resolve correctly without hanging

requirements.text: Add comprehensive frontend console logging in the Layout component to track the authentication lifecycle and Admin button rendering decisions, outputting: 1) when authentication state changes, 2) the isOwner hook return value and loading state, 3) whether the button render condition evaluates to true/false, 4) confirmation when the button element is added to the DOM
acceptanceCriteria: Console logs show complete authentication and rendering flow
Logs identify exact point where button rendering fails or succeeds
Timestamp tracking shows timing of state changes

requirements.text: Ensure the Layout component header conditionally renders the Admin navigation link only after the useIsOwner hook confirms admin access, with proper fallback handling if the hook is loading or returns undefined, preventing the button from being hidden due to premature evaluation
acceptanceCriteria: Admin button does not render before authentication completes
Admin button appears as soon as admin status is confirmed
No flash of content or button disappearing after initial render

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Changing the admin authentication method from Internet Identity principal-based to password-based
Modifying the backend isCallerAdmin logic or HashMap structure
Adding new admin authentication features or alternative login methods
Changing the admin panel content or statistics display
